creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
exp-run build log: http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64PR231931-default/2018-10-04_07h49m12s/logs/errors/conserver-com-8.2.1_1.log

OpenSSL 1.1.1 is now in head.

Conserver 8.2.2 reportedly is compatible with OpenSSL 1.1:
> I just published version 8.2.2 to GitHub.  Aside from some general doc updates
> (because of the move to GitHub), we have a fix for running with OpenSSL 1.1
> (and above, I hope) assembled by Eneas U de Queiroz (from some original work by
> Chris West)!
> 
> You can find the release here: https://github.com/conserver/conserver/releases/tag/v8.2.2
